How Gestify turns customer conversations into revenue

Omnichannel team inbox

Unify contacts and conversations from voice calls, email, WhatsApp, TikTok, Facebook Messenger, Instagram and more.

AI Agents

Deploy ready-made or custom AI Agents to answer FAQs, qualify leads, update customer data and lifecycle stages, route enquiries to the right team, book appointments.

Automate and integrate

Connect to HubSpot, Salesforce, Google Sheets, Zapier, Make, n8n and more to automate workflows.

Customer lifecycle management

Prioritize high-intent leads, design customer journeys for each lifecycle stage or identify common drop-off points.

3x your business results with Gestify 🚀
